title: 30 Pack Black Wine Bottle Bags, Single Handle, Simple Black Rectangular Paper Bag, 35x9x35cm

COMFORTABLE HANDLE - The handle of the wine bottle bag is humanized and comfortable to hold. At the same time, the black appearance is simple and generous, creating a perfect gift packaging effect for you. It's definitely your best choice.

APPLICATION SCENARIO - At the same time, the surface of wine gift bag single is blank. You can add your own stickers and text on the bag. Our three-color red wine bag can be used at home, parties and other places. The packaging items appear more advanced.

GUARANTEE - If our Wine Bottle Bags have any quality problems, you can request a refund within 30 days after receiving the products. Quality and customer satisfaction are our top priorities. Please don't hesitate to contact us at any time. You have no risk, click Add to Cart!
